Janei Lannister
Janei Lannister, by Wolfhertz ©

Janei Lannister is a member of House Lannister.

She is the only daughter of Ser Kevan Lannister and his wife, Dorna Swyft. She is their youngest child, and her older siblings are Ser Lancel and the squires Willem and Martyn Lannister.[2][3]
